svg.title: Hamster thinking loop v1 (scripted export)
svg.desc: Confirmed thinking loop animation for the V18 hamster. Self-contained scripted SVG: V18 body, PNG chin-paw stickers, breathing, bean-eye blink, brow/mouth micro expression, tie/back-hand/paw motion, and horizontal thought dots are driven by embedded ECMAScript. Confirmed by 鹿鹿 on 2026-06-08.
svg.metadata: { "export": "thinking-loop-v1-scripted", "confirmedBy": "鹿鹿", "confirmedDate": "2026-06-08", "source": "drafts/thinking-motion-v1/thinking-loop-v1/hamster-thinking-loop-v1.html?fix=phase-blink-v1-1780920200000", "master": "drafts/master/hamster-flat-layered-v18-noodle-hands.svg", "assets": [ "hamster-thinking-arm-patch-clean.png", "hamster-thinking-paw-patch-clean.png" ], "notes": [ "Self-contained SVG: no fetch and no external PNG files.", "Scripted animation. If embedded as an img in a browser, script execution may be disabled; use object/iframe or trusted scripted SVG runtime.", "Breath phase is locked 0 -> 50 -> 100; bean eyes blink vertically only." ] }

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways
